name: transform
description: Firedancer 'Transform': each offset-bound bullet sits at polar(radius, bearing) squashed per-axis in the local frame, then rotated by a second advancing angle - p = R(rotation) * S(scaleX, scaleY) * polar. The anisotropic scale plus the 4:2 bearing:rotation step ratio makes every bullet trace a rounded four-petal flower around the enemy. Needs runtime var access in expressions.

scaleX.description: Horizontal squash factor, applied in the local frame before rotation

scaleY.description: Vertical squash factor, applied in the local frame before rotation

bearingStep.description: Degrees bearing advances per frame (position along the squashed orbit)

rotationStep.description: Degrees the whole frame rotates per frame
